name: sentinel
description: Comprehensive AI security toolkit for Claude Code: 6 expert personas (advisor, white-box, black-box browser-DAST, CEH, OWASP, STRIDE threat-modeler) across 8 scopes (uncommitted+unpushed diff, whole project, a URL, whole website, one API, all APIs, STRIDE threat model, natural-language router). Covers OWASP Top 10 + API Top 10 + LLM Top 10, full CEH methodology, STRIDE, injection/RCE/misconfig, secrets, dependency CVEs + SBOM, auth/JWT/headers. Live targets use a Playwright-driven AI DAST (Acunetix-style whole-site crawl) behind a hard authorization gate.
